target_profile: Frontend, backend, and QA engineers targeting real jobs in Japan
search_scope: Multi-source real jobs in Japan verified on 2026-04-04 across TokyoDev, JapanDev, Wantedly, Forkwell Jobs, Green, and official company career pages.
methodology: Expanded the canonical live set by adding active Green listings on top of TokyoDev, JapanDev, Wantedly, Forkwell Jobs, and official career pages, then normalized everything into the shared dashboard schema.
assumptions: Only listings that were still reachable on 2026-04-04 were kept.
When an earlier publication date was not exposed clearly
first_posted_at falls back to the verification date.
key_takeaways: The previous 14-row dashboard was constrained by a narrow canonical source
and official career pages produces materially better coverage across frontend

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer, Money Forward Cloud, Fukuoka
jobs.tech_stack: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Redux, Apollo Client, GraphQL, Jest
jobs.summary: Lead frontend architecture and modernization work for Money Forward Cloud products, with a strong focus on React, Next.js, accessibility, and large-scale business UI development.
jobs.notes: Strongest senior frontend match in this sample due to modern stack, clear compensation, and explicit frontend architecture ownership. Verified open on 2026-04-04.
